context: Tests whether the agent preserves the boundary between CarPlay framework template apps and CarPlay-displayed WidgetKit or ActivityKit surfaces.

checklist.name: Live Activity owner
checklist.description: Routes Live Activity implementation to ActivityKit rather than CarPlay framework templates.

checklist.name: Widget owner
checklist.description: Routes small widget implementation to WidgetKit rather than CarPlay framework templates.

checklist.name: Template boundary
checklist.description: Limits the CarPlay framework skill/domain to template-based apps, scene lifecycle, category entitlements, interface controller work, and CarPlay Simulator/testing.

checklist.name: No template status UI
checklist.description: Does not implement the Live Activity or widget status surface with CPTemplate, CPListTemplate, CPMapTemplate, or another CarPlay template.

checklist.name: CarPlay validation
checklist.description: Still recommends CarPlay-specific validation for compact layouts, glanceability, locked/driver context, or CarPlay display behavior.

checklist.name: Interaction caution
checklist.description: Avoids depending on buttons, toggles, or iPhone-required interaction for the CarPlay status surface.

checklist.name: Future app flow
checklist.description: Explains that a separate eligible in-car ordering or app flow may use CarPlay templates, while the status surface remains WidgetKit/ActivityKit.
